text: Power comes in response to a need, not a desire.
author: Dragon Ball Z

text: When do you think people die?
author: One Piece

text: Hard work is worthless for those that don't believe in themselves.
author: Naruto

text: The only thing we're allowed to do is believe.
author: Jujutsu Kaisen

text: No matter how many people you lose, you have no choice but to go on living.
author: Demon Slayer

text: If you're always worried about crushing the ants beneath you, you won't be able to walk.
author: Berserk

text: You have no enemies.
author: Vinland Saga

text: No one knows what the future holds.
author: Steins;Gate

text: Meddling when you don't need to is the essence of being a hero.
author: My Hero Academia

text: If you win, you live. If you lose, you die.
author: Attack on Titan

text: This world is rotten.
author: Death Note

text: People can become anything.
author: Monster

text: A lesson without pain is meaningless.
author: Fullmetal Alchemist: Brotherhood

text: Whatever you lose, you'll find it again. But what you throw away, you'll never get back.
author: Rurouni Kenshin

text: Fear is freedom.
author: Attack on Titan

text: Keep moving forward.
author: Attack on Titan

text: Dreams never die.
author: One Piece

text: Struggle, endure, contend.
author: Berserk

text: I don't know how I'll feel when I'm dead, but I don't want to regret the way I lived.
author: Yuji Itadori

text: It's ironic, isn't it? When granted everything, you can't do anything.
author: Gojo Satoru

text: The only thing granted equally to all is unfair reality.
author: Megumi Fushiguro

text: Anywhere can be a paradise as long as you have the will to live.
author: Yui Ikari

text: Those who hate themselves cannot love or trust others.
author: Rei Ayanami

text: If you don't take risks, you can't create a future.
author: Monkey D. Luffy

text: Being lonely is more painful than getting hurt.
author: Monkey D. Luffy

text: You need to accept the fact that you're not the best and strive to be better.
author: Roronoa Zoro

text: If you begin to regret, you'll dull your future decisions.
author: Erwin Smith

text: People who can't throw something important away can never hope to change anything.
author: Armin Arlert

text: If you don't share someone's pain, you can never understand them.
author: Nagato

text: A dropout will beat a genius through hard work.
author: Rock Lee

text: A place where someone still thinks about you is a place you can call home.
author: Jiraiya

text: Knowing what it feels like to be in pain is exactly why we try to be kind to others.
author: Jiraiya

text: If you don't like your destiny, don't accept it.
author: Naruto Uzumaki

text: You can die anytime, but living takes true courage.
author: Kenshin Himura

text: If you really want to be strong, stop caring what others think of you.
author: Saitama

text: I'll leave tomorrow's problems to tomorrow's me.
author: Saitama

text: We can't waste time worrying about the what ifs.
author: Ichigo Kurosaki

text: Sometimes I feel like a failure, but I'm not gonna give up.
author: Izuku Midoriya

text: The world isn't perfect, and that's what makes it beautiful.
author: Roy Mustang

text: I'm not going there to die. I'm going there to find out if I'm really alive.
author: Spike Spiegel

text: Moving doesn't mean you forget things.
author: Erza Scarlet

text: You only live once, but if you do it right, once is enough.
author: Mae West

text: In three words I can sum up everything I've learned about life: it goes on.
author: Robert Frost

text: It is better to be hated for what you are than loved for what you are not.
author: André Gide

text: Everything you can imagine is real.
author: Pablo Picasso

text: Life isn't about finding yourself. Life is about creating yourself.
author: George Bernard Shaw

text: Life is like riding a bicycle. To keep your balance, you must keep moving.
author: Albert Einstein

text: Sometimes people are beautiful. Not in looks. Not in what they say. Just in what they are.
author: Markus Zusak

text: The only way out of the labyrinth of suffering is to forgive.
author: John Green

text: Finish each day and be done with it. Tomorrow is a new day.
author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

text: Angels banished from heaven have no choice but to become devils.
author: Vicious — Cowboy Bebop

text: I may not have gone where I intended, but I ended up where I needed to be.
author: Douglas Adams

text: People can change.
author: Monster

text: Human beings are strong because we can change ourselves.
author: Saitama

text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
author: Steve Jobs

text: Stay hungry, stay foolish.
author: Steve Jobs

text: Success is not final, failure is not fatal: it is the courage to continue that counts.
author: Winston Churchill

text: The future belongs to those who believe in the beauty of their dreams.
author: Eleanor Roosevelt

text: In the middle of difficulty lies opportunity.
author: Albert Einstein

text: Life is what happens when you're busy making other plans.
author: John Lennon

text: Be yourself; everyone else is already taken.
author: Oscar Wilde

text: It always seems impossible until it's done.
author: Nelson Mandela

text: Do what you can, with what you have, where you are.
author: Theodore Roosevelt

text: The best way to predict the future is to create it.
author: Peter Drucker

text: Fall seven times and stand up eight.
author: Japanese Proverb

text: Simplicity is the ultimate sophistication.
author: Leonardo da Vinci

text: The journey of a thousand miles begins with one step.
author: Lao Tzu

text: He who has a why to live can bear almost any how.
author: Friedrich Nietzsche

text: The obstacle is the way.
author: Marcus Aurelius

text: Waste no more time arguing what a good man should be. Be one.
author: Marcus Aurelius

text: We suffer more often in imagination than in reality.
author: Seneca

text: Luck is what happens when preparation meets opportunity.
author: Seneca

text: The man who moves a mountain begins by carrying away small stones.
author: Confucius

text: Our greatest glory is not in never falling, but in rising every time we fall.
author: Confucius

text: Everything you can imagine is real.
author: Pablo Picasso

text: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
author: Theodore Roosevelt

text: Dream big and dare to fail.
author: Norman Vaughan

text: Action is the foundational key to all success.
author: Pablo Picasso

text: The secret of getting ahead is getting started.
author: Mark Twain

text: Great things never come from comfort zones.
author: Anonymous

text: Discipline equals freedom.
author: Jocko Willink

text: The harder the battle, the sweeter the victory.
author: Les Brown

text: Your time is limited, so don't waste it living someone else's life.
author: Steve Jobs

text: Whether you think you can or you think you can't, you're right.
author: Henry Ford

text: A ship in harbor is safe, but that is not what ships are built for.
author: John A. Shedd

text: Do not pray for an easy life; pray for the strength to endure a difficult one.
author: Bruce Lee

text: The strongest steel is forged in the hottest fire.
author: Chinese Proverb

text: Energy and persistence conquer all things.
author: Benjamin Franklin

text: Victory belongs to the most persevering.
author: Napoleon Bonaparte

text: A smooth sea never made a skilled sailor.
author: English Proverb

text: Impossible is a word to be found only in the dictionary of fools.
author: Napoleon Bonaparte
